title: Iraq piles pressure on OPEC over quota dispute after UAE exit
summary_full: Reuters reported that though Iraq had considered leaving OPEC, the ​current plan is to remain a member of the group while seeking a higher output quota.
summary_public: Reuters reported that though Iraq had considered leaving OPEC, the ​current plan is to remain a member of the group while seeking a higher output quota.
